message:
fix(cli): relax variable name pattern to allow leading digits and underscores

The regex for parsing --VAR=value CLI args now accepts names starting
with digits or underscores, matching the broader set of template
variables that can appear in prompts (e.g. {{_INTERNAL}} or {{2ND_ARG}}).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
